Privacy Policy | Terms of Use | Accessibility Statement | Preference Center

Darn Tough Vermont - Merino Wool Socks Guaranteed for Life
We process your personal information to measure and improve our sites and service, to assist our marketing campaigns, and to provide personalised content and advertising. For more information see our privacy policy: Privacy Policy

Managing Your Consent to Cookies

When you visit our website, we store cookies on your browser to collect information that relates to you, your product preferences, and/or your device. These cookies make the website function as you would expect it to and in some cases, they provide a more personalized website experience (like recognizing you when you access the website). If you are from certain states (and if we meet the threshold requirements under the law of your state), you may choose not to allow cookies related to targeted advertising and performance (also referred to as analytics). Website visitors may also opt out of targeted advertising on a global basis by visiting https://globalprivacycontrol.org/ and following their opt-out instructions.
Privacy Policy

Manage Consent Preferences

Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for our website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions taken by you which amount to a request for services by your device, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block these cookies, but some parts of the site will cease to function. These cookies do not store any personal information.

Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Data (Opting Out of Targeted Advertising)

Always Active

As a visitor to the Darn Tough website from California, Colorado, Montana, Nebraska, Nevada, New Hampshire, Oregon, Texas, or Virgina, you have the right to opt out of our sharing any of your personal information to any third party for cross-context behavioral advertising, otherwise known as “targeted advertising.” We don’t sell personal information to anyone, but unless you opt out, we do share information with certain advertising partners (e.g., Facebook). Opting out means that you won’t see our advertisements on other websites.

  • Cross-Context Advertising Cookies
    Always Active

    These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant advertisements on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less advertising targeted to your interests.

Performance Cookies

Always Active

Performance cookies allow us to measure and improve our website's performance. They gather data that informs us which pages are the most and least popular and allows us to see how visitors navigate the website, for example, by recording mouse movements, clicks, and scrolls. These cookies may collect personal information. Opting out of these cookies potentially compromises our ability to improve our website. See our privacy policy linked above to understand how we handle your data. Note that if you do not toggle the button to “Opt Out,” you will opt in to these cookies.
